commit.message:
fix: Telegram bot improvements — inspect, dedup, context (#54)

* fix: handle Anthropic tool_use finish_reason in agent loop

The agent loop checked for finish_reason == "tool_calls" (OpenAI
format) but Anthropic returns "tool_use". This caused the loop to
break after round 1 without processing tool results, producing
empty responses ("no response generated").

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat: add /inspect command to Telegram bot

Shows tool actions, sources, and timing from the last query.
Also captures statuses, sources, and perf_trace events from
the chat SSE stream for inspection.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: prevent duplicate Telegram messages from Claude Code sessions

[NOTIFY] messages were sent during assistant events AND re-extracted
from the result event, causing duplicates. Now skips re-extraction
when notifications were already sent during the session.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: detect imperative follow-ups for conversation context retention

"look in my email", "check my calendar", "search drive for it" etc.
were not recognized as follow-ups, so the previous question's context
was lost. Added regex pattern for imperative verbs + data source nouns.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* test: add tests for PR review findings; strip PII from /inspect

- Add unit tests for expand_followup_query imperative patterns
- Add tests for orchestrator notification dedup (notifications_sent > 0)
- Move _IMPERATIVE_FOLLOWUP_RE to module level per convention
- Strip tool input args from /inspect output (show tool name only)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

---------

commit.message:
fix: disable Bing in SearXNG — was poisoning results with Chinese/German noise

SearXNG vs WebSearch comparison showed 0-5 loss entirely due to Bing
returning Zhihu posts, German Telekom pages, and Microsoft certification
pages for English queries. Disabling Bing immediately fixes result quality.

feat: wire real HebbianSynaptic from steward-protocol

- Temporal decay on boot (prevents rigidity)
- Weights persist via PersistentMemory (survives CI/API containers)
- No local JSON files — ephemeral-safe

repository.description: Discord bot for showing Ethos scores

commit.message:
fix(manual-close): always use actual wallet shares instead of calculated shares_size

ctx.shares_size is theoretical (size_usdc / entry_price) and differs from
the real conditional token balance due to Polymarket fees and rounding.
This caused "not enough balance/allowance" on every manual SELL because
maker_amount exceeded actual holdings.

Fix: always fetch wallet positions to get the real share count before
building the SELL order. Also sell at bid price (not bid-0.02) to
guarantee immediate fill as a taker.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: evaluate cognetivy — state layer for AI coding agents

WATCH recommendation. Strong conceptual fit (agent state management)
but too young (53 stars, 2 weeks old, no npm package). Revisit when
mature or when manna-ai needs a state runtime.

commit.message:
fix(vaccines): smart overdue count using vaccineMap instead of raw records

BentoGrid, SmartAlerts and Dashboard were counting ALL raw vaccine
HealthRecords with past next_date, inflating the overdue count (e.g.
"11 vaccins en retard" when only a few unique vaccines are actually
overdue). Now uses computeVaccineMap() which groups records by vaccine
type and only counts truly overdue unique vaccines. Also displays
canonical French names via ref.name instead of raw DB titles.

feat: VMess 延迟嗅探支持，对齐 Xray sniffing 行为

VMess 等加密协议在 ParseStream 阶段无法解密首包，导致嗅探始终为 none。
现在对 initial_payload 为空的协议，提前 WrapStream 建立解密流，
读取首包明文后执行 TLS/HTTP 嗅探，实现 dest_override 和域名恢复。

commit.message:
fix: all checks run in CI regardless of individual failures

Each check step uses continue-on-error: true so ruff/complexipy/xenon/pytest
all run even if one fails. A final 'results' gate step fails the job if any
check was not successful (treating 'skipped' as passing for file-scoped checks).

Fix scheduled posts only broadcasting to first room

All scheduled post dedup keys (wotd, holidays, gaming, anime, movies,
concerts, birthdays) were global — after posting to the first room,
the job was marked complete and the second room was skipped. Fixed by
including the room ID in each dedup key so posts go to all broadcast
rooms. Birthday XP grants and DMs remain once-per-user-per-year.

feat: parallel quality analysis via quality-analyzer agent

- Add quality-analyzer agent: runs test, ruff, complexipy, xenon in parallel;
  all tools report even if one fails; identifies combined findings (same
  function/file flagged by multiple tools); returns CLEAN / TEST_FAILURE /
  ISSUES_FOUND status
- Update iterate-until-clean: fix pass stays sequential (ruff:fix must precede
  complexity checks), verify pass now uses quality-analyzer for parallel execution
- Update /lint-check: uses quality-analyzer instead of sequential task python:tdd
- Update iterate-until-clean reference.md to document the parallel/sequential split

commit.message:
fix: scale auto-reconnect fails after scan discovery (#378) (#380)

When a scale is discovered via BLE scan, its address was saved to
Settings (persistent) but not loaded into BLEManager's runtime memory.
This caused all reconnect retries to fail with "no saved scale
address/type" after a scale power-cycles.

fix(review): remove _resetRegistry from useReviewHotkeys — fixes E2E F1e

_resetRegistry() in useReviewHotkeys wiped the entire singleton binding
registry including KeyboardCheatSheet's ctrl+shift+? binding. Each hook
already cleans up its own bindings via useEffect cleanup functions, so
the global reset was both unnecessary and destructive.

commit.message:
feat: Skip already-scraped posts at post level (shortcode deduplication)

- Added scraped_shortcodes parameter to scrape_account()
- Posts already in gym_index.json are skipped before any Instagram
  API call or download — avoids wasted bandwidth and rate limit usage
- main() builds per-account set of shortcodes from existing index
  and passes it into each scrape_account() call
- Updated done log to show: X new images, Y posts already scraped (skipped)
- In-run set kept in sync so multi-account runs stay consistent

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add character spritesheet template (832x3456, 52x64 cells)

Blank grid template matching GraalOnline standard format with row
labels for each animation direction/action. Artists draw over cells.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add multi-tenant and personal Microsoft account support (#5)

- Microsoft account add: --tenant-id and --client-id are now optional;
  omitting --client-id falls back to the built-in shared app registration
- Auth uses common endpoint (Entra + personal MSA) when no tenant is set;
  resolved home tenant is persisted to config after first login
- Token cache renamed to msal_{accountId}.cache with automatic migration
  from the old msal_{tenantId}.cache to avoid forcing re-login on upgrade
- Setup: allow selecting zero calendars (NotRequired on multi-select prompt)

Co-authored-by: Thomas Solbjør <thomas.solbjor@fortedigital.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: 추천 피드(For You Feed) 구현 — 사용자 친화도 기반 개인화 정렬

사용자의 좋아요/북마크/댓글/조회/팔로우 신호를 분석하여 게시글별 친화도 점수를 계산하고,
hot score와 결합한 combined_score로 개인화된 피드를 제공합니다.

- DB: user_post_score 테이블 (materialized score, 30분 주기 배치 갱신)
- 모델: affinity_models.py (7개 신호 SQL 수집, 벌크 UPSERT)
- 스코어러: affinity_scorer.py (순수 Python, tag 50% + category 30% + author 20%)
- 서비스: feed_service.py (배치 오케스트레이션, asyncio.Lock 동시 실행 방지)
- 피드: post_models.py LEFT JOIN + COALESCE 폴백, 다양성 필터 (작성자당 최대 3개)
- 콜드 스타트: 점수 없는 사용자는 latest 정렬로 자동 폴백
- 테스트: 22 cases (스코어러 단위 + 다양성 필터 + API 통합 + 모델 레이어)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
refactor: consolidate Discord notifications in CLI, remove tongzhi queue (#13)

* docs: add DISCUSSION-phase2-planning.md — P0/P1 task planning and decisions (ZZ-20260309-030)

* refactor: consolidate Discord notifications in CLI, remove tongzhi queue

CLI (`src/chaoting`):
- Replace `_send_thread_notify` with `send_discord()` that falls back to
  DISCORD_FALLBACK_CHANNEL_ID when no thread_id exists
- All commands (new, plan, done, fail, vote, revise) now send notifications
  through this single path — no more silent drops
- Add `chaoting notify <zid> <body>` command for dispatcher to call

Dispatcher (`src/dispatcher.py`):
- Remove tongzhi queue system: notify_enqueue, notify_worker,
  _send_discord_thread, _send_discord_channel, _format_notification,
  _preload_audit_logged, _tongzhi_dedup_insert, _notify_state_change,
  check_thread_activity_warning, PRIORITY_EMOJI, EVENT_VERB
- Dispatcher-only events (review approved, three strikes, review timeout,
  exec timeout) now call `chaoting notify` via subprocess
- _check_new_done_failed simplified to silijian-only notifications
  with liuzhuan-based dedup instead of tongzhi

Schema (`src/init_db.py`):
- Remove tongzhi table from schema and migrations
- Existing DBs keep the table but nothing writes to it

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

---------

Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Fix text-image overlap, embed word pictures, add rendering quality check

Text was overlapping scene images because _draw_chunk_with_scene called
_draw_chunk at full page width. All item renderers now accept column
bounds (content_left/content_right) so text is constrained to a 60%
content column when scenes are present. Word pictures from the asset
manifest are now embedded in match items instead of placeholder boxes.
Added text-image overlap detection to print quality validation (Check 6)
using PyMuPDF bounding box intersection. Fixed asset_gen.py to use
google.genai SDK with response_modalities instead of deprecated
google.generativeai with unsupported response_mime_type.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
feat: pre-commit-review, documentation, autopilot, combined findings, skill split

- Add pre-commit-review skill: advisory design review (primitive obsession, bare
  excepts, missing type annotations, mixed abstraction levels, wrong validation layer)
- Add documentation skill: audit/write module docstrings, function docstrings,
  type annotations for public APIs
- Add /autopilot command: full lifecycle — design → tests → implement → clean →
  document → advisory review → quality report
- Add combined findings to report-quality: surfaces functions/files flagged by
  multiple tools as shared root cause
- Split iterate-until-clean into SKILL.md (concise) + reference.md (detailed
  failure handling, fix strategies, output formats)

to use the new structure.

fix: Align cart and checkout logic with test_store implementation

- Update store-provider to handle local cart for guest users
- Simplify cart page to use only Context cart (remove Zustand dependency)
- Update cart-drawer to use productId/variantId for updates/removes

Add milk carton missing member feature (!haveyouseenthem, !missing)

Generates milk carton style "missing person" PNG images using gg library
with embedded Go fonts. Tracks inactive members via daily_activity, with
configurable thresholds (MISSING_THRESHOLD_DAYS, MISSING_MAX_DAYS,
MISSING_MIN_MESSAGES, MISSING_EXCLUDE_USERS). Rate limited to 1 carton
per room per day. Derives flavor text characteristics from user stats
and sentiment data. Avatar fetching with 3-tier fallback.

commit.message:
feat: Hebbian tier escalation — Buddhi learns from session outcomes

Buddhi now adjusts model tier based on SessionLedger success rates:
- FLASH → STANDARD when action type success rate < 50%
- STANDARD → PRO when success rate < 30%
- Rates refresh each run_stream() for live learning

This is the first real cross-session learning: the agent uses a more
capable model when past attempts at the same task type kept failing.
Context pressure (>70%) still overrides to FLASH (cost control).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
